introduction.title: 1. Introduction
content: Heroapps Software Development Services (“us”, “we”, or “our”) operates the website at HeroApps Official Website, which will be referred to as the “Service” hereafter.
This Privacy Policy governs your visit to the Service and explains how we collect, protect, and disclose information that results from your use of the Service.

We use your data to provide and improve the Service. By using the Service, you agree to the collection and use of your information under this Policy. Unless otherwise defined in this Privacy Policy, the terms used in this Policy have the same meanings as in our Terms and Conditions.
Our Terms and Conditions (“Terms”) govern the use of the Service, and together with this Privacy Policy, they constitute the Agreement between you and us.

sections.title: 2. Definitions
sections.content: PERSONAL DATA means any information that relates to an identified or identifiable natural person. USAGE DATA is data collected automatically, either generated by the use of the Service or from the Service's infrastructure itself (e.g., the duration of a page visit). COOKIES are small files stored on your device (computer or mobile device) that contain data that can be accessed by the Service. DATA CONTROLLER means a natural or legal person who, alone or jointly with others, determines the purposes and means of processing Personal Data. DATA PROCESSORS (OR SERVICE PROVIDERS) means any natural or legal person who processes Personal Data on behalf of the Data Controller. We may use the services of various Service Providers to process your data more effectively. DATA SUBJECT is any natural person whose Personal Data is being processed. USER refers to the individual using the Service and corresponds to the Data Subject whose Personal Data is being processed.

sections.title: 3. Information Collection and Use
sections.content: We collect various types of information for multiple purposes to provide and improve our Service to you.

sections.title: Personal Data
sections.content: While using our Service, we may request that you provide us with specific personally identifiable information that can be used to contact or identify you (“Personal Data”). Personally identifiable information may include, but is not limited to:

items: Address, country, state, province, postal code, city

sections.content:
Some of our applications may require collecting personal information to support core app functionalities such as authentication, account management, rankings, progress tracking, synchronization, communication features, and personalized user experience.

We may use your data to contact you with newsletters, marketing or promotional materials, and other information that may be of interest to you. You have the right to opt out of receiving any or all of these communications by following the unsubscribe link provided in our emails.

sections.title: 4. Data Retention
sections.content:
We retain Personal Data only for as long as necessary to provide and maintain the Service, comply with legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce our policies.

User account information and related app data may be retained while the account remains active. Certain data may also be retained for security, fraud prevention, backup, analytics, or legal compliance purposes where applicable.

When data is no longer required, we securely delete or anonymize the information within a reasonable timeframe.

sections.title: 5. Account Deletion and Data Removal
sections.content:
Users have the right to request deletion of their accounts and associated personal data.

Some of our applications provide an in-app account deletion feature that allows users to permanently remove their accounts and related information directly from the application.

Users may also request account and data deletion by contacting us through the contact information provided below.

Upon successful deletion request:

items: User accounts will be permanently removed
Associated personal information will be deleted
User-generated records such as rankings, scores, and activity history may also be removed
Certain information may be retained when required for legal, security, fraud prevention, or regulatory purposes

sections.title: 6. Third-Party Services
sections.content: Our applications may use third-party services such as:
These third-party services may collect information used to identify you in accordance with their own privacy policies.

sections.title: 7. Changes to This Privacy Policy
sections.content:
We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date.

Users are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes.

sections.title: 8. Contact Us
sections.content: If you have any questions or concerns regarding this Privacy Policy, you may contact us at: Email: heroapps25@gmail.com Website: HeroApps Official Website
